Complete Condition Report — Verified & Certified

This EcoSmart water bottle has undergone comprehensive inspection testing to ensure it meets our quality standards for second-hand items. Full functionality guarantees and transparent cosmetic disclosure.

  • Full leak test performed (no seepage under pressure)
  • Cosmetic wear assessment completed (minor surface scratches only, no structural damage)
  • Material integrity verified (no rust or corrosion detected)

All features work exactly like the new version — leak-free, durable, temperature-retentive.

Cosmetic Condition Detail Report

This EcoSmart unit shows light use but maintains full structural integrity and aesthetic appeal. Minor surface marks from previous owner, no functional impact.

  • No scratches or dents affecting functionality
  • Literally used — but still looks great after careful maintenance
